name: Schulz's Guacamole Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Crushed Corn Chips, Chili Cheese Fritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear lettuce into small pieces.
2. Combine the torn lettuce with grated Cheddar cheese, Monterey Jack cheese, chopped scallions, and halved cherry tomatoes in a salad bowl.
3. Cover the salad bowl and refrigerate until serving time.
4. In a separate bowl, mash the avocado and mix it with fresh lemon juice, sour cream, corn oil, and Picante sauce until well combined.
5. Toss the lettuce mixture with the dressing.
6. Sprinkle crushed Corn Chips, Chili Cheese Fritos over the top of the salad before serving.
